transcript: a double-decker bus and is the largest and most complete skeleton of its kind ever found in the UK. Jonah Fisher reports. Last February on a bank of mud in a Midlands reservoir, Joe Davis made an extraordinary discovery. I looked down and just saw this series of ridges in the mud and thought hang on that looks different there's something there that's different and it had organic features on almost like where it connects onto the rib.
